query:
UPDATE termination_notices 
SET dataFim = DATE_ADD(dataInicio, INTERVAL (diasAviso - 1) DAY),
    updatedAt = NOW()
WHERE deletedAt IS NULL 
  AND dataInicio IS NOT NULL 
  AND dataFim IS NOT NULL
  AND dataFim != DATE_ADD(dataInicio, INTERVAL (diasAviso - 1) DAY)

  AND dataFim != DATE_ADD(dataInicio, INTERVAL (diasAviso - 1) DAY)
